Poseidon Diving School Phu Quoc Padi isn't the dive school tourists stumble into. It's the one serious divers quietly book before anyone else does.

First dive or PADI cert, the instructors here treat both the same way. Small groups. Real attention. No factory-line feeling.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
